  • Uses of Table in domain

    Methods in domain that return Table
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Table
    Table.copy()
    Returns a copy of the table with the same name.
    Methods in domain that return types with arguments of type Table
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Table>
    TableRepository.getTables()
    Returns the list of tables in this repository.
    Methods in domain with parameters of type Table
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    ColumnTypeValidator.isColumnTypeValid(Column column, Table table)
    Checks if all values in a given column are valid for the column's current type.
    boolean
    TableRepository.isTableNameValid(String name, Table excludeTable)
    Checks whether the given name is valid and unique among all tables, excluding the specified table.
    void
    TableRepository.remove(Table table)
    Removes the given table from the repository.
    void
    TableRepository.updateTableName(Table table, String newName)
    Updates the name of the given table if the new name is valid.

    Description

    Returns the currently selected table, or null if none is selected.

    Method
    Description
    List<Table>
    TableSubwindow.getTables()
    Returns the list of tables shown in this subwindow.
    Methods in ui with parameters of type Table
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SubwindowManager.addNewTableDesignSubwindow(Table table)
    Adds a new TableDesignSubwindow for the specified table.
    void
    SubwindowManager.addNewTableRowsSubwindow(Table table)
    Adds a new TableRowsSubwindow based on the currently selected table, if the current subwindow is a TableSubwindow and a table is selected.
    TableDesignSubwindow
    SubwindowFactory.createNewTableDesignSubwindow(Table table)
    Creates a new TableDesignSubwindow for the given table.
    TableRowsSubwindow

    Creates a new TableRowsSubwindow for the given table.
